name: Code Review
description: Analyze codebase for quality issues, classify findings by severity, fix critical issues, and generate a report.

config.prompt: Analyze the codebase for code quality issues, security vulnerabilities, and performance bottlenecks. List findings.
Review the analysis and classify each finding by severity: critical, high, medium, low. Suggest fixes.
Fix the critical issues identified in the review.
Generate a markdown report of all findings and recommended fixes.
